task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium location to Chancellorsville, VA (38.310°N, 77.636°W).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Location window should be visible in a screenshot, showing the latitude set to approximately 38° 18' 36" N (38.310°) and longitude to 77° 38' 9" W (77.636°).

task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium date and time to May 3, 1863, at 02:10:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Date/Time window or the bottom toolbar should show the date as 1863-05-03 and the time as 02:10:00 (with UTC or appropriate timezone offset visible).

task_completion.description: Enable the atmosphere, landscape, and azimuthal grid in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky view should show the ground/horizon (landscape enabled), a realistic sky rather than pure black space (atmosphere enabled), and green/blue circular coordinate lines across the sky (azimuthal grid enabled).

task_completion.description: Select and center the Moon in the Stellarium view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moon should be positioned in the exact center of the Stellarium screen. Selection markers (crosshairs) should be around the Moon, and its astronomical data (phase, azimuth, etc.) should be visible in the top-left corner.
A file manager or terminal window should show an image file successfully saved inside the `/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/` directory.

task_completion.description: Document the Moon's position and phase in a research note at ~/Desktop/chancellorsville_moon_notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor should be open showing a file named `chancellorsville_moon_notes.txt` (or similar) located on the Desktop. The text must mention the Moon's phase (Full Moon / ~99.6% illuminated) and position (Southeast / Azimuth ~140.5°).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Stellarium application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Stellarium application interface (toolbars, menus, rendered sky) rather than just terminal commands or scripts attempting to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the configured Stellarium view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image file saved in the Pictures directory must visually match the Stellarium view seen in earlier steps, including the specific grid, landscape, and centered Moon.

integrity.description: The agent derived the notes from the Stellarium output rather than hallucinating or copy-pasting external text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values written in the research notes should correspond to the data visible in the Stellarium top-left information overlay when the Moon is selected.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Location: 38.310°N, 77.636°W. Date/Time: 1863-05-03 02:10:00 UTC. Expected Moon Phase: Full Moon (~99.6% illuminated). Expected Moon Position: Southeast (Azimuth ~140.5°). Notes path: /home/ga/Desktop/chancellorsville_moon_notes.txt. Screenshots dir: /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.
